title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV. RIGHTS

SUBPART A. ACCESS TO TREATMENT FOR TERMINALLY ILL PATIENTS

§1169.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Right To Try Act".

            Acts 2014, No. 346, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.421 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART IV.  RIGHTS
SUBPART A.  ACCESS TO TREATMENT FOR TERMINALLY ILL PATIENTS
§1169.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Right To Try Act".
